name: ax-to-d365fo-migration-expert
description: Enterprise AI migration command center for Microsoft Dynamics AX 4.0+ to Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce AX to D365FO migration scope with AI inventory analysis, governance, dashboards, and delivery artifacts.
interface.longDescription: Enterprise AI migration command center for Microsoft Dynamics AX 4.0, AX 2009, and AX 2012 environments moving to Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations. Helps identify what must be migrated, what D365FO standard can replace, what should be configured, and what can be retired. Covers technical inventory analysis, complexity scoring, effort estimation, customization disposition, X++ pattern detection, data entity mapping, integration modernization, report rationalization, standard feature matching, dependency analysis, risk mitigation playbooks, quality gates, upgrade path decisions, target architecture, compliance, ALM, ROI/business case, anti-waste scoring, wave planning, training impact, cutover simulation, reconciliation, Azure DevOps work items, command center dashboards, decision logs, and executive briefings.
defaultPrompt: Find what we can retire, replace, configure, or migrate from this AX inventory.
Generate a migration command center dashboard from my AX inventory CSV.
Create quality gates, risk playbooks, and Azure DevOps work items for this migration.
